subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein voices have been raised and delights transmuted, as though earth and heaven had been transformed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ارتفعت الاصوات و بدلت اللذات کان الارض و السماء قد تحولنا الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prophecy and fulfillment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @stories; anecdotes, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
